content:
So I've played through the first chapter over the last couple days and I think I'm sticking with the game for a while, it's pretty solid and quite fun. Though I've heard it gets pretty hard later on.
Already managed to pull the following units, decided to focus on Caro and Aequor realms. Should I keep pulling on the standard Aqueor banner to get more copies/more Aqueor characters, or should I switch to pulling for more Caro.
What teams can I build with the characters from the standard 2 banners (or even just from what I have atm).
Also how worth is it to pull on the novice 5 guaranteed SSR banner? I don't really know how good the characters in any of those banners are so, Is it better to just buy a sub and wait for a while to get limiteds instead?

I currently have Clementine at E1 and was wondering if I should keep on pulling either her or her WoD. Which would you prefer if I wanna run a team around her? Thanks in advance <3

Bonus question: any other banners I should look out for to help with a Clementine team?
thread_title: Clementine E2-4 vs Veiled Anguish WoD

content: I'm doing very well in my story rn, but I would like some support from the community itself to have more understanding of the game.
